let { execSync } = require('child_process') let pico = require('picocolors') try { let version = parseInt(execSync('npm -v')) if (version <= 6) { process.stderr.write( pico.red( 'Update npm or call ' + pico.yellow('npx browserslist@latest --update-db') + '\n' ) ) process.exit(1) } // eslint-disable-next-line no-unused-vars } catch (e) {}
